generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that over 70% of NATO allies still don't meet their 2% GDP defense spending commitment? While some argue for more civil defense spending, the real issue is that our allies aren't pulling their weight. Until they do, we can't afford to divert resources from proven deterrence strategies. #NationalSecurity #AllianceBurdenSharing
